meta.title: AI Dev 25 | Chaya Nayak: Unlocking the Power of Llama
meta.description:
At AI Dev 25, Chaya Nayak, Director of Product Management for Generative AI at Meta, offered a deep dive into the capabilities and vision behind Llama, Meta’s open-source family of generative AI models.

Chaya walked through the current landscape of Llama models, the developer tools designed to support them—such as Llama Stack and LlamaGuard, the role of community-driven development in shaping Llama’s future, and why open-source collaboration is essential to innovation in AI.

This talk is a valuable resource for developers, researchers, and product builders interested in building with open source models and contributing to their evolution.
